code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut best_start = 0
mut best_len = 0
mut cur_start = 0
mut in_word = false
mut i = 0

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  if is_ws
    if in_word
      let wlen = i - cur_start
      if wlen > best_len
        best_len = wlen
        best_start = cur_start
      end
      in_word = false
    end
  else
    if not in_word
      cur_start = i
      in_word = true
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if in_word
  let wlen = n - cur_start
  if wlen > best_len
    best_len = wlen
    best_start = cur_start
  end
end

let word = string.substring(line, best_start, best_start + best_len)
println("longest=#{word}")
